paper_title: Pythia: A suite for analyzing large language models across training and scaling

extraction_data.innovation: Pythia provides a suite of decoder‑only transformer language models across multiple scales to enable systematic analysis of training dynamics and scaling behavior.
extraction_data.extension: Uses rotary embeddings, FlashAttention, and untied embedding/unembedding matrices to improve training efficiency and interpretability.
extraction_data.research_problem: Understanding how training data, scale, and checkpoints affect model behavior and memorization in large language models.
extraction_data.application: Research on language model behavior, bias, scaling, and evaluation across diverse NLP tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Pythia: A suite for analyzing large language models across training and scaling
